ext_weather.name: Today
ext_weather.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Isolated Rain Showers
ext_weather.detailedForecast: Isolated rain showers after 2pm. Mostly sunny. High near 71, with temperatures falling to around 64 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
